title: Who is more broken Asuka or Shinji
display_title: Who is more broken Asuka or Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Who is more "broken"; Asuka or Shinji?             Quote Post by Another Asuka » Fri Jan 30, 2009 7:47 pm Pretty much all the characters are broken but of the aforementioned two who do you believe is more broken. I say Asuka? Surprised?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 30, 2009 7:48 pm Asuka, Shinji is just a bitch.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Jan 30, 2009 7:52 pm None of them are broken, they just need something that they can't seem to find. I guess if that's considered 'broken' then I guess they are. Except for Shinji, he's a whiney little brat who can't be happy with anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Jan 30, 2009 8:25 pm They're both "broken" in their own way. I think that it is implied that Shinji gets "fixed" after EOE, but Asuka's mental status is still up in the air.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Jan 30, 2009 8:27 pm Shinji didn't appear very 'fixed' to me at the end.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Jan 30, 2009 8:28 pm Holy Diver wrote: I think that it is implied that Shinji gets "fixed" after EOE, but Asuka's mental status is still up in the air.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Jan 30, 2009 8:32 pm Shinji's just going to break down again, it's what he does. Asuka's just going to throw a hissy fit again, it's what she does.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Fri Jan 30, 2009 9:05 pm I think Asuka is the worst out of all of the pilots. Mentally, of course. She has an acceptance problem, and needs to think she's the best in order to function. Shinji is just a depressed emo kid.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Jan 30, 2009 11:25 pm BrikHaus wrote: Shinji doesn't really need to get fixed. There's no way that dude is gonna get a chance to procreate, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sat Jan 31, 2009 12:25 am Asuka, definitely. Sure, Shinji saw his mom die, which is traumatizing, but it was completely accidental. Asuka had to experience her mother go insane, treat a doll as her, and hang both the doll and herself. That'll screw you up. Although...I don't want to draw this too off topic, but wasn't it the fact that Asuka's mother donated the protective and caring side of her soul to Unit 2 the reason that she went crazy? And didn't Asuka get all better once she realized this? If so, then Shinji's more broken, because he just remains in his downward spiral.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 31, 2009 9:03 am It depends which point along the roller-coaster you make the comparison.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sat Jan 31, 2009 2:05 pm If you mean who is more dysfunctional, I'd say Asuka, since she's actually given herself an entire new personality to face up to the outside world. All Shinji does is hide his feelings within himself, which would be perfectly fine if the rest of the world didn't desperately need him to pluck up the courage to beat the Angels. On the other hand, were it not for the EoE sequence of events, I'd say Asuka was more on the way towards personality repair than Shinji was throughout; she at least would be able to speak about her problems and tell others how she was feeling as opposed to Shinji who'd simply curl up and fall silent.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Feb 02, 2009 4:38 pm Mr. Tines wrote: It depends which point along the roller-coaster you make the comparison.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 02, 2009 7:08 pm Threads like this are pointless, all the characters are equally messed up in their respective ways. However, if you're referring to the final scene of EoE... Although Asuka looks physically broken (bandages) there's strong evidence to support otherwise (if she really was injured, she wouldn't be able to move her arm to caress Shinji's cheek at all). Besides Asuka's appearance however, it's hard to tell just what she's feeling/thinking other then there's hope her personality will change for the better. Shinji on the other hand.... I'll just let these images speak for themselves other then saying he's gonna need therapy and a lot of it to recover from prolonged isolation. (Although most of the cast needs serious therapy for their problems anyway.)

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Mon Feb 02, 2009 7:13 pm First of all it is impossible to do these kinds of comparisons, since emotional pain is all relative. I know hearing that will piss a lot of people off but once you get to the level of fucked up events that Shinji and Asuka went though, you cant say "whos more broken". So in agreeing with SSD, this thread is pointless...and a bit insulting

[]:             Quote Post by Another Asuka » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:51 am I don't know...I'm going to say Asuka. She screws up with her Eva and goes into catatonic depression. She seems to repress more than Shinji and once those defence mechanisms are truly broken even once she's hospitalised. Shinji breaks down a lot more but he's been through more trauma thoughout the series and keeps on getting back up again.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:58 am honsou wrote: First of all it is impossible to do these kinds of comparisons, since emotional pain is all relative. I know hearing that will piss a lot of people off but once you get to the level of fucked up events that Shinji and Asuka went though, you cant say "whos more broken". So in agreeing with SSD, this thread is pointless...and a bit insulting

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Feb 03, 2009 2:19 pm So . . . is Rei NOT broken?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Feb 03, 2009 3:10 pm Of course she's broken, but she seems to actually kind've get better at the end. She certainly gets as close as she's ever going to.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 03, 2009 6:52 pm I have to agree with SailorStarDust and Honsou..... You try living through the EoE mind rape and say "Peeshaw that was nothing. Oh and this little beach with blood looking water? Perfect for swimming! Maybe I'll build a sand castle where my school used to be! Hey Asuka I know you and your EVA were torn to shreds but would you like to join me to walk it off?" "Yeah. These bandages that I somehow got means I am physically healed. And this one over my eye? Hmm... I know! I'll be a pirate! Argh!"
summary:
[]: Who is more "broken"; Asuka or Shinji?             Quote Post by Another Asuka » Fri Jan 30, 2009 7:47 pm Pretty much all the characters are broken but of the aforementioned two who do you believe is more broken. I say Asuka? Surprised?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 30, 2009 7:48 pm Asuka, Shinji is just a bitch.
